name: The Inspector
description: Spend 2 random dice from hand or active pile after each day

name: The Tax Man
description: Playing your most played hand sets money to zero

name: The Broken Wagon Wheel
description: 1 in 7 dice are covered in grime (unknown)

name: The Ghost Town
description: All played even dice values are disabled (no additional miles or enhancements will trigger)

name: The Undertaker
description: All played odd dice values are disabled (no additional miles or enhancements will trigger)

name: The Preacher
description: Only one hand type allowed for round

name: The Call Girl
description: Must play different hands each round

name: The Trickster
description: Every played hand reduces trail knowledge by one before scoring

name: The Bottle
description: Base trail knowledge is halved for entire round

name: The Jinx
description: One random piece of equipment disabled per day

name: The Bank Lien
description: All dice disabled until one piece of equipment sold

name: The Bounty
description: Disables re-rolling of one random dice per day

name: The Land Slide
description: Flips and shuffles all equipment (can't see front of card)
